steps.title: Identify the true subject and its number
steps.content: The subject is The African Games Co-production Market — one singular entity. The intervening phrase "one of over 180 annual international conferences supporting video game development" is set off by commas and describes the subject; it does not change it. Strip the interrupter out: "The African Games Co-production Market ______ the growth..." — the verb must be singular.

steps.title: Eliminate plural verbs and confirm the answer
steps.content:
Test each verb form for agreement with a singular subject:
  • Choice A — 'promote': bare plural form — agrees with plural subjects like "they" or "conferences," not with a singular noun. ✗
  • Choice B — 'are promoting': plural present progressive — "are" requires a plural subject; a singular subject takes "is promoting." ✗
  • Choice C — 'promotes': singular simple present — the "-s" ending marks agreement with a third-person singular subject like "The African Games Co-production Market." ✓
  • Choice D — 'have promoted': plural present perfect — "have" requires a plural subject; a singular subject takes "has promoted." ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
